items.label: Title menu — Continue / New game; overwrite confirm on New game
Species step — five folk with role + flavor blurb from data
Name step — enter name or blank → Traveler
Motivation step — investigator / messenger / neighbor; copy makes sense
Confirm sheet — STR–CHA mods, AC, initiative, three abilities match species
Opening beat — 3 flavored narration lines; Continue / Begin
Control hint toast readable after beat
Continue skips wizard + opening beat
Pip uses your name + motivation append line
Causeway — backdrop fills frame; exits readable
Lilymarket — stalls not cropped; NPCs on ground plane
Croakend — focal art readable; NPCs not stacked
Mudwall — levy/wall visible; combat area obvious
Ferryman's Rest — ferry/lamp readable; Grizz placement OK
Sprites — feet on floor, shadows OK, no z-fight
UI — prompts/panels not clipped at 1080p
Click ring only on walkable ground, not domes/walls
Click-to-move responsive; no wild zigzag
E key picks nearest interactable when close
Districts feel like places, not grey boxes
Can't walk there only when genuinely off-nav
Schedule — wrong folk leave; expected folk appear
No hour-teleport glitch on clock tick
Merchants/elders/ferry hand in sensible spots
No ugly 3+ NPC stacks in normal hours
Vole: Sable Meadowrun species dialogue (if playing vole)
Domet WIS — duel popup with d20 + mod + DC
Kess INT — duel popup + species line
Combat attacks show duel popup; pacing OK
SUCCESS/FAIL/HIT/MISS banner readable

sections.title: Main quest — What the Water Remembers

items.label: Quest active from opening; HUD shows real title/stage
Pip acknowledges you already heard
All four examines findable without guessing
Domet + Kess make levy vs Charter clear
Council vote — choices understandable
At least 2 endings feel distinct
Can explain levy vs Charter in one sentence
Ferryman's Toll — Grizz → Jenna → Grizz flow
Wrong Label — Pondwort → shelf → Marta → Pondwort
Blackfen — Persuade/Intimidate before first attack
Species abilities make sense for your folk
Combat log matches screen
Flee works; enemy turns resolve — no soft-lock
[J] Journal entries unlock; opened voluntarily
Weather icon + rain VFX; amphibian buff noticeable
Pip/Marta buy flow works
Esc pause → save → reload persists state
Mute toggle works; survives reload

metrics.label: Agency — named a consequence from a choice
Combat clarity — diplomacy or dice log clear
Immersion — opened journal without being told
